Medical.Perscription: Auvi-Q (epinephrine shot) Reccuring Indefinitely :: For application in case of allergic reaction
Cymbalta x32dose monthly :: For duloxetine, addressing peripheral neuropathy
Medical.Notes: Frequent complaints about back pain, identified as minor nerve damage. Cymbalta perscribed for double function as anti-anxety treatment, given some erratic behaviour during visits.

Person.Notes: A digital marketing specialist working for a computer security software company. He can be bought over by a hacker group by giving him a forged degree in digital computer security (he is ridiculed (accuratley) about knowing nothing about what he sells by his co-workers).
